hindi: ॐ जय श्री श्याम हरे, स्वामी जय श्री श्याम हरे। भक्तन के दुख हरते, संकट पल में टारे॥
english: Om, victory to Shri Shyam Hari; you remove the sorrows of devotees and dispel difficulties in an instant
roman: Om Jai Shri Shyam Hare, Swami Jai Shri Shyam Hare, Bhaktan Ke Dukh Harte Sankat Pal Mein Tare

hindi: बर्बरीक थे भीम पुत्र, कृष्ण प्रिय बने। खाटू में विराजे, हारे हुओं के बने॥
english: He was Barbarika, son of Bhima, became dear to Krishna; dwelling in Khatu, he champions those who have lost hope
roman: Barbarik The Bheem Putra Krishna Priya Bane, Khatu Mein Viraaje Haare Huon Ke Bane

english: Om, victory to Shri Shyam Hari

hindi: शीश दान कर भगवान को, बलिदान दे दिया। सत्य और वचन का पालन कर, अमर हो गए हिया॥
english: He offered his head to the Lord as the ultimate sacrifice; by upholding truth and his word, he became immortal in the heart
roman: Shish Daan Kar Bhagwan Ko Balidan De Diya, Satya Aur Vachan Ka Palan Kar Amar Ho Gaye Hiya

english: Om, victory to Shri Shyam Hari

hindi: खाटू श्याम की आरती, जो कोई भक्त गावे। लाखों की भीड़ में भी, श्याम दर्शन पावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of Khatu Shyam; even among lakhs of devotees, attains the darshan of Shyam
roman: Khatu Shyam Ki Aarti Jo Koi Bhakt Gaave, Laakhon Ki Bheed Mein Bhi Shyam Darshan Paave

hindi: ॐ जय श्री श्याम हरे, स्वामी जय श्री श्याम हरे॥
english: Om, victory to Shri Shyam Hari
roman: Om Jai Shri Shyam Hare, Swami Jai Shri Shyam Hare
